label: IsoniaOS v0.8 managed execution pinned Sepolia fork
purpose: Deterministic replay and read-model validation for the managed execution smoke scenario
liveSepoliaUse: Snapshot, Safe, Tally, Agora, GitHub, and Discourse link checks
pinnedForkUse: Deterministic replay of modeled protocol events
Control Plane raw event and projection rebuild validation
Route and execution receipt explanation checks
expectedReplayChecks: Raw event storage includes blockHash for execution receipt logs.
Projection rebuild preserves proposal target, value, actionSelector, and dataHash.
Managed executor address is indexed when present.
Direct execution remains distinguishable from managed execution.
Read models do not import provider evidence as authority.
notes: Pin a real Sepolia block before replaying read models.
Transactions created on a pinned fork are not visible to public external providers.
Do not use fork-only transaction hashes as live block explorer or provider evidence.
